question: Based on the chart, which statement about website visitors over this two‑week period is most accurate?

options.A: Visitor numbers were generally higher during the first week than during the second week.
options.B: Visitor numbers were generally higher during the second week than during the first week.
options.C: Visitor numbers were exactly the same on every day of the two‑week period.
options.D: Visitor numbers increased steadily each day throughout the two‑week period.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
